Elite Coaching Programme

The Complete
Beginner Package

Our statistics show that beginners need 8–10 rounds to leave the range and start playing on course. During this period, you gain deep understanding of the sport — theory and practical. We've packaged everything so you focus on one thing: training.

UGX 700k
10-Lesson All-Inclusive Package
  • 10 professional coaching sessions
  • All range fees included
  • Range balls included
  • Caddie fees covered
  • 2 on-course sessions included
  • Coach fees — fully covered
  • No hidden extra charges

* Just show up and train — everything else is handled.

Dress Code

Golf Attire

✓ Allowed

  • Coloured shirts / jerseys
  • Converse / sneakers
  • Golf shoes
  • Office shoes (range only)

✗ Not Permitted on Course

  • Jeans (not allowed on course)
  • Office shoes (not on course)
  • Plain / non-collared attire
Junior Development

Kids Programme

We nurture young talent with fun, disciplined, and professional training at the Marylouise Simkins Memorial Golf Club. Our programmes focus on building golf skills, confidence, mental strength, and valuable life lessons — all while keeping the game enjoyable for every child.

CURRENTLY RUNNING

Holiday Junior Program

Namulonge Junior Academy

Schedule
Every Mon, Wed & Fri
Time
8:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Training Fee
UGX 50,000 / week
Green Fees
FREE

Perfect for beginners and advanced juniors. Sessions include skills drills, on-course play, rules education, and fun games.

Enroll Now · 0779 100 655
Requirements to Join
  • ✓Golf shoes or canvas shoes
  • ✓Collared T-shirts
  • ✓Soft trousers or skirts
  • ✓A book & pen for notes
  • ✓Reliable transport
Important Note

Those collecting children must present a copy of the student ID at pickup.

Where We Train

Marylouise Simkins Memorial

Golf Club · Namulonge, Uganda

All Pro Koto coaching sessions — range work, on-course play, and beginner programmes — are held at the Marylouise Simkins Memorial Golf Club in Namulonge.
